review: Tried to make first order, got all the way to "Confirming Order", and then it just failed. Tried resubmitting six times with a different error each time, all saying to contact support for explanation. What a garbage app.
great experience and quick easy meals

this app rarely works. every time I have tried to place an order recently, it won't let me. tonight, for example, the delivery feature is stuck on a closed location and not letting me change it to the open one. what is the point of having reward points, if the only way to order delivery is through a third party app such as doordash that doesn't honour those rewards? one of many reasons I started going to Burger King — as much as their food is subpar in comparison, at least the app works.
McDonalds has the resources to improve the app.. the performance is way too slow on modern devices. Please hire native Android developers and fix the performance. It shouldn't be this bad.
Works well but I wish I could add gift cards as a payment option as I hate to use a credit card when just buying a small purchase such as a coffee.

Every time i have ordered something about my order has been missing and I have needed to contact support. The last time I ordered they refused to refund me for something that I purchased but was not delivered. Customer support was extremely vague in their explainations and refused to clarify.
wayyy to slow. I can't even order anything or add coupons anymore. so it's basically useless. all I see is the loading screen fries infinitely
